// v0.7.2: master expansion + safe high-margin OCR auto-confirm
const MODEL = "@cf/moondream/moondream3.1-9B-A2B";
const APP_B64 = "";

export default {
  async fetch(request, env) {
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    if (request.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/") return htmlResponse(APP_B64);
    if (request.method === "POST" && url.pathname === "/api/recognize") return recognize(request, env);
    return new Response("Not Found", { status: 404 });
  }
};

function htmlResponse(encoded) {
  const bytes = Uint8Array.from(atob(encoded), c => c.charCodeAt(0));
  return new Response(bytes, {headers: {"content-type":"text/html; charset=utf-8","cache-control":"no-store","x-content-type-options":"nosniff","referrer-policy":"no-referrer"}});
}

function dataUriToImageArray(uri) {
  const comma = uri.indexOf(',');
  if (comma < 0) throw new Error('画像データの区切りがありません。');
  const binary = atob(uri.slice(comma + 1));
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < binary.length; i++) bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);
  return Array.from(bytes);
}

async function recognize(request, env) {
  if (!env.AI) return Response.json({error:'Workers AIバインディング「AI」が設定されていません。'},{status:500});
  let body;try{body=await request.json()}catch{return Response.json({error:'画像データを読み取れませんでした。'},{status:400})}
  const image=String(body?.image||''),count=Math.max(1,Math.min(8,Number(body?.count)||1)),mode=body?.mode==='single'?'single':'batch';
  if(!/^data:image\/(?:png|jpeg|webp);base64,/i.test(image))return Response.json({error:'画像形式が不正です。'},{status:400});
  if(image.length>5_500_000)return Response.json({error:'解析画像が大きすぎます。'},{status:413});
  const question=mode==='single' ? singlePrompt() : batchPrompt(count);
  try{
    const imageArray=dataUriToImageArray(image);
    const result=await env.AI.run(MODEL,{task:'query',image:imageArray,question,reasoning:false,temperature:0,max_tokens:Math.max(160,count*70),stream:false});
    const raw=String(result?.answer??result?.response??result?.description??result?.text??'').trim();
    const items=parseItems(raw,count);
    return Response.json({items,raw,model:MODEL,debug:{bytes:imageArray.length,keys:result&&typeof result==='object'?Object.keys(result):[],resultType:typeof result}});
  }catch(error){console.error(error);return Response.json({error:'視覚AIの解析に失敗しました。',detail:String(error?.message||error)},{status:500})}
}

function singlePrompt() {return [
  'This is one factor-name row from the Japanese game Uma Musume Pretty Derby.',
  'Transcribe only the brown factor name in the upper part of the row.',
  'Ignore the icon, stars, border and all numbers.',
  'Do not translate or explain. Preserve Japanese, Latin letters, hyphens and the circle symbol ○.',
  'Return the factor name only, as one plain-text line. If completely unreadable, return ?.'
].join('\n')}
function batchPrompt(count) {return [
  `This image contains exactly ${count} numbered factor rows from the Japanese game Uma Musume Pretty Derby.`,
  'Read the brown factor name in each row and return one name per line in numerical order.',
  'Ignore icons, stars, borders and index numbers. Do not translate or explain.'
].join('\n')}

function parseItems(answer,count) {
  const clean=String(answer||'').replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i,'').replace(/\s*```$/i,'').trim();
  if(count===1){const lines=clean.split(/\n+/).map(sanitize).filter(Boolean),name=(lines.find(x=>x!=='?'&&x.length<=80)||'');return[{index:1,name,candidates:name?[name]:[],raw:clean,confidence:name?68:0}]}
  const lines=clean.split(/\n+/).map(x=>sanitize(x.replace(/^\s*\d+[.)：:]?\s*/,''))).filter(x=>x&&x!=='?');
  return Array.from({length:count},(_,i)=>({index:i+1,name:lines[i]||'',candidates:lines[i]?[lines[i]]:[],raw:clean,confidence:lines[i]?62:0}));
}
function sanitize(v){return String(v||'').replace(/^['"`「『]+|['"`」』]+$/g,'').replace(/^(name|factor)\s*[:：]\s*/i,'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().slice(0,80)}
